<!-- SPEC-MANAGED: projects/guard/tech-design/semantic/guard-projects-guard.md#schema -->
<!-- CODEGEN-BEGIN -->
# guard Agent Context

> TD-first map for agents. Start from tech design and capability intent before implementation files.

## Tech Design

- [Tech Design](tech-design): implementation source of truth.
- Validate: `aw td check projects/guard/tech-design`.

## Capability Map

- [README](README.md): capability source of truth and product contract.

## Agent Workflow

- Continue: `aw run --project guard`.
- Next managed step: `aw standardize managed next --project guard`.
- Readiness: `aw health --project guard`.

## Commands

- Build debug: `./build.sh debug`.
- Build release: `./build.sh release`.
- Install: repo root `install.sh --project=guard` dispatches to `./install.sh`.
- Test: `cargo test -p guard -p guard-cli`.

## Root Artifacts

- [llms.txt](llms.txt): generated by `aw standardize managed run`.
- [build.sh](build.sh): debug/release build entrypoint.
- [install.sh](install.sh): project-local install entrypoint.
<!-- CODEGEN-END -->
